markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize SoW, pricing, and security requirements for contract signature.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SoW Approval:** Mithil's legal team is reviewing the SoW for terms (e.g., termination rights), not pricing, which is handled by sourcing/stakeholders. Feedback is expected today.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [**Pricing Negotiation:** Mithil will propose two Phase 2 options to finance: $15k/mo with monthly billing, or $12.5k/mo with quarterly billing. The lower price is to align with their typical $9k–$12k agency spend.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Security Access:** GrowthX requires "must-have" access to Google Search Console & Analytics for performance reporting. CMS access is "nice-to-have" but not critical, as it complicates the DPA requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The earliest possible start date is November 10. The goal is to finalize all contract items by the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

## Topics

### SoW & MSA Review

  - [The Master Service Agreement (MSA) is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [The Statement of Work (SoW) is under legal review for terms like termination rights and payment schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Pricing is not part of the legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Pricing & Payment Terms

  - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** Approved at $30k for a 3-month term (extended from 2 months at no extra cost to align with their fiscal calendar).](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The extended term allows the team to work with GrowthX for nearly 3 months before deciding on Phase 2, providing full clarity on the partnership's value and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing Engagement):** Mithil will propose two options to finance:](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Option A (Preferred):** $15,000/month with monthly billing.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Option B (Alternative):** $12,500/month with quarterly billing.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The lower price is to align with their typical agency spend of $9k–$12k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Payment Terms:** Net 30, with actual payment expected within a few weeks due to their bi-weekly pay runs.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**PO Structure:** Mithil will confirm if Phase 1 and 2 require one or two Purchase Orders.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Security & System Access

  - [**Must-Have Access:** Google Search Console & Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Essential for GrowthX to deliver performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Nice-to-Have Access:** CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Not critical, as it complicates the Data Processing Addendum (DPA) requirement. GrowthX has been advised by legal counsel (Goodwin) that a DPA should not be necessary.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Security Addendum:** GrowthX will send its formal response to the redlines before discussing this topic further.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Contract Timeline

  - [**Start Date:** The earliest possible start date is November 10.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Goal:** Finalize all contract items by the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mithil:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [Get legal feedback on SoW terms by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [Secure finance approval for Phase 2 pricing and quarterly billing.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [Confirm PO structure (one vs. two) for Phase 1 & 2.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Provide the "must-have" vs. "nice-to-have" security access list to the security team.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Confirm the November 10 start date with Nima.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Share the GrowthX sales deck and ROI proof points to support finance discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Send GrowthX's formal response to the security addendum redlines.](https://fathom.video/share/zyBHm9FzD47MrsKnyz2r6Qye2Sz7mngt?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
